behavior_summary: This item acts as a simple examinable object named 'bedroll'. When the player uses the examine/U8P_OPNBDROL::look action (U8P_OPNBDROL::look) it displays the short label "bedroll" and then suspends the U8P_OPNBDROL::look process.

When the item is used (U8P_OPNBDROL::use), the script issues an engine-level changeItemType call to replace/transform this item into type 0x0216 at the item's coordinates. This implies the bedroll is converted or swapped for another item type when used.
notable_control_flow: U8P_OPNBDROL::look: on U8P_OPNBDROL::look/examine, emit a single bark/text "bedroll" then suspend the process (ends the examine interaction).
U8P_OPNBDROL::use: perform coordinate queries Item::getZ/Y/X(this) and call FREE::changeItemType(z,y,x,0x00,0x0216,this) to change the item type in-place.
open_questions: What concrete item or gameplay object does type id 0x0216 correspond to (the new type after changeItemType)?
Does the changeItemType call represent consuming the bedroll, replacing it with a usable item, or spawning an environment object? The intent is inferred but not explicit.
Are there any conditions, costs, or actor checks (e.g., proximity or actor inventory) gating U8P_OPNBDROL::use that are implemented elsewhere?

main_function.name: U8P_OPNBDROL::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines this item (display "bedroll"), then suspend/terminate the U8P_OPNBDROL::look process.
entry_conditions: Player triggers the LOOK/examine action on the item (engine starts the U8P_OPNBDROL::look process for this object).

function_map.name: U8P_OPNBDROL::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_OPNBDROL::look handler: show short label and suspend

function_map.name: U8P_OPNBDROL::use
function_map.role: U8P_OPNBDROL::use handler: transform/replace this item by calling engine changeItemType with target type 0x0216

external_calls.purpose: Provide the Z coordinate of this item for the changeItemType call
Provide the Y coordinate of this item for the changeItemType call
Provide the X coordinate of this item for the changeItemType call
Engine-level replacement/transform of the item at the given coordinates to new type id 0x0216; parameters observed: z,y,x,0x00,0x0216,this

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This item acts as a simple examinable object named 'bedroll'. When the player uses the examine/U8P_OPNBDROL::look action (U8P_OPNBDROL::look) it displays the short label "bedroll" and then suspends the U8P_OPNBDROL::look process.
